name: Suspicious Commands Linux
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Commands Linux
SIGMA Description: Detects relevant commands often related to malware or hacking activity

False positives:
- Admin activity

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND ((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%chmod%' AND Command LIKE '%777%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%chmod%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%u+s%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%cp%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%/bin/ksh%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%cp%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%/bin/sh%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Commands Linux on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND ((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%chmod%' AND Command LIKE '%777%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%chmod%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%u+s%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%cp%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%/bin/ksh%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%cp%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%/bin/sh%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) SIGMA Title: Suspicious Commands Linux SIGMA Description: Detects relevant commands often related to malware or hacking activity  False positives: - Admin activity  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
